Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Tangible Things, Request For Statement Setting Forth Nature And Amount Of Damages Sought And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Diamond Village Heights Association's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Tangible Things, Request For Statement Setting Forth Nature And Amount Of Damages Sought is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $370, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
